message:
test(robot): add comprehensive sensitivity and disclosure-control verification [bd-j9jo3.9.11]

Add sensitivity_test.go (adapters) with 25+ unit tests covering:
- DisclosureMetadata states: visible, redacted, preview_only, withheld
- Safe-preview generation for various secret patterns
- No-leak guarantees in JSON serialization
- Disclosure consistency across fields
- Redaction diagnostics and detailed logging
- Edge cases: empty, whitespace, unicode, multiple secrets
- Allowlisted fields (IDs, file references)
- Known secret pattern verification (critical vs nice-to-have)
- Performance and payload size checks

Add sensitivity_e2e_test.go with E2E tests covering:
- Snapshot output sensitivity
- Attention feed sensitivity
- Event replay sensitivity
- Inspect output sensitivity
- JSON re-serialization sensitivity

Tests document current behavior and identify gaps:
- Critical patterns (ghp_, sk-ant-, AKIA, Bearer) are caught
- Some patterns (github_pat_11, xoxp-, Basic auth, URL passwords) are not yet caught

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.5 <noreply@anthropic.com>
